creative_brief: Hero image: Rachel standing in a green paddock at golden hour, Kempsey NSW, looking directly at camera — confident, weathered, real. Below-the-fold: grid of named farm partners with candid on-farm photography. Earthy palette — sage, warm cream, charcoal type. Sentence case throughout. No stock photography.
headline: I bet my career that Australians would pay fairly for food they could trust
subhead: I'm Rachel. I walked away from acting to raise cattle on a regenerative farm in Kempsey, NSW. What the supply chain does to farmers — and to your food — made me angry enough to build something new. FarmThru is a grocery store that cuts every middleman between the farm and your family.
hero_copy: Here's what I learned the hard way: a farmer can pour everything into raising animals right — regenerative pastures, no shortcuts, real care — and a wholesaler will still tell them their product is worth less than it cost to produce. That's not a broken system. That's a system working exactly as designed — just not for farmers, and not for you. FarmThru exists because I refused to accept that. Zero warehouses. Zero wholesalers. Zero middlemen. Just food from farms I know personally, priced so they can keep farming and you can keep feeding your family well.

sections.heading: The grocery store I wish existed when I started farming
sections.body: When I moved to Kempsey, I thought the hard part would be the land. It wasn't. The hard part was watching neighbours sell beef below cost because a middleman set the price. I watched families leave farms that had been theirs for generations. And I watched supermarket shelves fill with food that had travelled 2,400km, passed through cold storage, and lost something along the way — freshness, nutrition, honesty. FarmThru is an online grocery store built on one rule: every product comes direct from a regenerative farm. You order online, then collect from our Brookvale hub Monday to Friday. No subscription. No commitment. Order when you want. That's it.

sections.heading: You'll know every farmer by name
sections.body: Bundarra Farm raises pork — real pork belly, pork and fennel salami, little French ham — on their terms. Collins Wild Caught brings in wild-caught Alaskan salmon and seasonal Australian seafood from the South Coast of NSW. Paris Creek Farms in Meadows, SA produces carbon-neutral biodynamic dairy. Farmer Brown supplies eggs from NSW. Little Yarran Farm, also NSW. These aren't supplier codes on a spreadsheet. They're people I've stood beside, whose paddocks I've walked. We'll show you where your food comes from. That's not a slogan — it's a promise printed on every order.

sections.heading: This isn't a subscription box — it's a real grocery store
sections.body: I know what you're thinking. Another farm box that shows up with six zucchinis and a mystery vegetable. FarmThru is not that. It's a full online grocery store stocked with regenerative meat, seafood, dairy, eggs, and more — sourced direct so it's fresher and so farmers actually get paid fairly. No lock-in. No weekly box you didn't ask for. Browse what's available, order what your family needs, collect from Brookvale. The direct supply chain means fresher food and fairer farmer compensation. We only stock food we'd feed our own families.

sections.heading: Own a piece of the grocery store that's changing the supply chain
sections.body: I didn't build FarmThru to keep it to myself. We're opening ownership to the people who believe food should be honest — through our equity crowdfunding campaign. You can be part of it. Own a piece of a grocery store that puts regenerative farms first and cuts every middleman out. This is early. There are real risks — like any business at this stage, there's no guarantee of returns, and you could lose your investment. But if you've ever looked at a supermarket shelf and wondered who grew this, where it came from, and whether the farmer got a fair deal — this is your chance to vote for change with your wallet. Join the waitlist. A $5 refundable deposit holds your spot. No further commitment until you're ready.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: FarmThru's equity crowdfunding campaign is conducted under the Australian crowd-sourced funding regime. Investing in early-stage businesses carries significant risk, including the potential loss of your entire investment. Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future results. No returns are guaranteed. This page is not financial advice. Please read the offer document in full before making any investment decision and consider whether the investment is appropriate for your personal circumstances.
